name: chain_how_i_added_16_new_customers_in_30_days_
method:
How I Added 16 New Customers in 30 Days (+31% MRR) Hey everybody, hope it’s going well.

I want to share the results of my last 30 days running my SaaS, what worked, what didn’t, and what I’ll improve

stages.task: Build prospect lists from LinkedIn Sales Nav free, Apollo free tier, Reddit subreddits matching ICP
Score by ICP fit, company size, tech stack signals, recent funding. Prioritize LinkedIn-first (best channel per alpha)
LinkedIn AI agent personalized messages (36/day limit), cold email sequences (500/day across warmed domains), Reddit value-add comments
Track replies, positive signals, demo bookings. Feed demo prep context to human
